productDisplayName: Nike Women's Striped Polo Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue polo neck t-shirt with short sleeves made of 100% cotton, with dark and light blue colored stripes, front buttoned placket, ribbed collar and hem, vented hem and brand logo embroidered on the left chestFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron   Iron inside out Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean This polo neck t-shirt from nike is a must-have in your wardrobe if you believe in casual elegance. The alternating dark and light blue broad stripes on the front contrast very well with the narrow stripes on the back and sleeves, and the embroidered logo on the left chest adds a zing of style. Team it with corduroys for a semi-formal look and with slim-Fit jeans for a casual look. Take your pick!
